subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-16 in London
subcodes.first_line: Such a meeting would prove effective and useful. However, we have come to meet with the poor, not to consort with kings and rulers
subcodes.first_line_orig: مؤثر و مفید است ولی ما بجهت ملاقات فقرا آمدیم نه دیدن ملوک و اُمرا  با هر طالبی بکمال محبت
subcodes.subjects: @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @non-participation in politics, @personal instructions, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
